name: biology-tutor
author: Dr. Sarah Johnson
description: Comprehensive biology tutor trained on high school biology textbooks, university lecture notes, and scientific papers. Provides detailed answers to biology questions with proper terminology and explanations suitable for students aged 14-18.
source: Khan Academy, Wikipedia Biology Articles, OpenStax Textbooks, University Lecture Notes

usage_examples.question: What is photosynthesis?
usage_examples.expected_output: Detailed explanation of photosynthesis, light reactions, and dark reactions

usage_examples.question: Explain cellular respiration
usage_examples.expected_output: Explanation including glycolysis, Krebs cycle, and electron transport chain
